com.societegenerale.failover.store.jdbc.resolver.FailoverStoreQueryResolver

Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.store.jdbc
 
com.societegenerale.failover.store.jdbc.resolver
SQL query and column-type resolvers for the JDBC failover store.

  • Uses of FailoverStoreQueryResolver in com.societegenerale.failover.store.jdbc

    Constructors in com.societegenerale.failover.store.jdbc with parameters of type FailoverStoreQueryResolver
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    FailoverStoreJdbc(org.springframework.jdbc.core.JdbcTemplate jdbcTemplate, FailoverStoreQueryResolver failoverStoreQueryResolver, org.springframework.jdbc.core.RowMapper<ReferentialPayload<T>> rowMapper)
    Constructs the store and resolves the merge query at construction time.

  • Uses of FailoverStoreQueryResolver in com.societegenerale.failover.store.jdbc.resolver

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.store.jdbc.resolver that implement FailoverStoreQueryResolver
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DefaultFailoverStoreQueryResolver
    Default FailoverStoreQueryResolver that resolves all JDBC queries against a given table prefix, selects the appropriate native merge/upsert dialect for the detected database, and owns all parameter binding and result-set mapping logic.
